creator: AnarCat@anarcat.dyndns.org
text:
Some packages in editors/xemacs-*-packages are out of date.

This is not a big problem, but looks ugly in my package listing. ;)

Fix: Here is a quick patch to a few of these directories. I think the other
ones are ok.

I also bumped the port versions, not sure if it was necessary.
How-To-Repeat: 
Open up xemacs and update the package list. It's red everywhere! :)
